choices: Free day, get to know one of your neighbours
Nothing comes to mind, chill out for a while
1.content:
You woke up suddenly as your entire room began to vibrate rhythmically. Shooting up out of bed in a daze you assumed it was an earthquake and took cover under a nearby table.
After a few seconds the shaking began to subside, growing fainter and fainter. As you climbed out from under the table and you actually started to wake up, you chuckled at how ridiculous you had just been, it was obviously the vibrations from someone walking past your apartment that woke you up, not an earthquake.

You still hadn’t gotten used to living right next to the floor level of the hallway. Every morning for the last few months you had been woken up by one of Greentower Apartment’s many residents wandering past your apartment, causing a considerable amount of noise for someone of your size.
The other tiny guys that also had a habitation box in this retrofitted storage closet didn’t have this issue since theirs weren’t sitting on the ground, they were stacked on top of your habitation box.
Still, you couldn’t complain too much, your “apartment” was much nicer than what most tiny guys had, and sure beat the shelf you lived on in your mom’s closet back home.
Living on your own had some other benefits as well, not having to constantly be around your airhead mother and cruel sister being the primary one.

You quickly got dressed, pulling on a simple T-shirt and jeans, before pulling open the curtains that covered your window, flooding the artificial light of the hallway into your one room apartment.

Your apartment was compact, but you felt you had made it cozy with the little you had available to you, there wasn’t a big market for furniture and decorations for tiny living spaces. Your bed, still messy from your startled awakening, sat in the corner opposite the door. The main room acted as both your bedroom, living room and kitchen. There was a door to the bathroom on the same side of the room as your bed.

Your observation of your apartment was interrupted as the rhythmic thudding of another set of footsteps caused the room to lightly vibrate, turning your attention to outside of the window. You thought briefly that you should speak to your landlady, Taylor, about any way you could possibly reduce the impact of people walking past, but decided it would be better not to. She, quite frankly, scared the hell out of you after she found out you were trained as a lawyer. You’re not sure what exactly it is that she has against lawyers, but you don’t want to find out.

Looking out the window, you saw one of your fellow tinies, a guy called Andrew who lives in one of the blocks above you, not walking along the designated path for tinies at the sides of the hall. You briefly wondered why, before you looked off to your left, following his gaze. He was staring down the hallway towards the massive form of Violet Quinn, one of your neighbours from across the hall, who was walking down the hall away from him. His eyes were firmly glued on her backside, swaying and jiggling as she walked away.

However, since he was too busy watching Violet, he didn’t notice where he was standing or the vibrations, and you watched as, before he could even turn around, a shoe descended on him, crushing him instantly. You looked up to see the familiar form of Chloe Kim, one of your neighbours from down the hall, who just kept walking as if nothing had happened. You couldn’t be sure whether the short, black haired girl hadn’t noticed him, or had and just didn’t care. As she took her next step, you saw Andrew go with her, pressed deep into the treads of her well worn keds. Sighing in sympathy for Andrew, you could only be glad that you weren’t in his position.
Living as long as you had as a tiny guy, you had come to accept getting squashed as an unpleasant fact of life. Sure, you try to avoid it whenever you can, but it will happen sometimes. You just had to try and live as normal a life as you could and hope for the best.

Being squashed had other drawbacks than just the pain as well, poor Andrew would most likely be missing whatever he had planned for the day, if not longer than that. You yourself missed a large chunk of your classes in your second year of your law degree to several squashing incidents, leading to damage to your grades that you never really recovered from, leading to your current situation.
An unpaid internship wasn’t the ideal scenario, sure, but at least you had this opportunity, and you promised yourself that nothing was going to get in your way this time.

You weren’t sure exactly what you had planned for today, your first day of your internship was coming up, but you couldn’t remember exactly when it was. You’d need to check your calendar, but first you wanted to have breakfast, your alarm clock wouldn’t be due to go off for another hour, so you had time.

After preparing as nice a breakfast as you could given your size, which amounted to little more than a few crumbs to a normal sized person, you crossed the room to your much too large alarm clock and struggled to turn it off. It was around the same size as you, and it was one of the smaller ones you could get.

Moving into the bathroom, you started to brush your teeth, and tried to remember what it was you were planning to do today.

1) Your thoughts are interrupted by the sound of a knock at your door, rushing out of the bathroom you look through the window to see a pair of nice looking high heels. The sight of them reminds you that today was your first day at your internship, and the partners had arranged for one of the other interns, Isabella Martin, to pick you up. You will have to quickly get changed into a more professional outfit.
2) Your thoughts are interrupted by the sound of a knock at your door. You remember that you weren’t due to start your internship for another few days, so who could it be?
3) After emerging from the bathroom you look at your calendar, you don’t have any plans today, so you decide to go and hang out with one of your neighbours, or you could see about getting acquainted with one of the neighbours you haven’t met yet.
4) You finish brushing your teeth without any interruptions. Making your way over to your calendar, you realise that you didn’t have your internship for another few days, but you had made plans.
5) You realise that you didn’t have anything planned for today, so you decide to just chill out and see if anything comes to mind for you to do today. (I will fill this option in the future).
1.title: A New Day

11.content:
Looking up at Isabella from your window sent you into a panic, you had totally forgotten it was your first day!
You rushed to your closet and pulled out the shirt, tie and trousers that your sister had taken you to buy a few days ago and rushed to pull them on quickly.

You had just finished pulling on your trousers when there was another knock at your door, Isabella was lightly tapping on the side of your apartment with her foot.
“Hi, um... Anthony? Are you home, because we’re going to be late,” her soft spoken voice was soothing, and calmed your panic.

Just as you had gotten on your clothing and was fixing your tie, you heard her huff in confusion and began to hear the booming sound of her foot shifting, she was getting ready to leave!

You rushed out of your door, hair still a mess and tie in hand, undone. By this point Isabella had turned around and was in the process of taking her first step away from your apartment. You looked towards her massive ass, confined in a formal skirt which her cheeks strained against, sway from side to side as she began to walk away.
“Isabella! Wait up!” You cried as loud as you could, hoping that she could hear you down here.

“Huh?” Isabella heard a voice, but wasn’t sure where it had come from. She turned and looked in the general direction of the voice calling out to her, not fully registering that it was you who called out to her.

You were stopped in your tracks as the shadow of Isabella’s right foot covered you, and you could only let out a small, barely audible yelp as you were crushed under the toe of Isabella’s high heel.

Luckily for you, Isabella heard both your scream and a small squishing sound as her foot impacted, and she grimaced as she pieced together what had happened.

“Oh no, sorry Anthony, didn’t see you there,” she frowned and gingerly lifted her foot off of you, to reveal your crumpled form, flattened but not stuck to her shoe. Your trousers and shirt were dirty and lightly torn, but you popped back into shape relatively quickly.

“Sorry Anthony, you took so long that I thought that maybe I was at the wrong apartment. I really should be more careful with little guys like you but I just don’t have any experience...” she trailed off as she caught sight of your clothes and her frown deepened and you could see tears welling up in the corners of her eyes. “Oh and your clothes too, I’m so, so sorry Anthony. Please tell me you have another set of clothes? We’re already going to be late so I’d rather not have to explain why your clothes are torn and dirty as well.”

“Yeah I have a change of clothes, luckily I decided to buy a few sets of clothes for this job,” you sighed before rushing back into your apartment to change. Your first day was not off to a good start, but at least Isabella seemed caring enough to be genuinely upset that she stood on you. Hopefully most of the women at Martinez, Anderson and Roberts would be as considerate as her. On some level, however, you knew that wouldn’t be the case.

You quickly pulled on another set of clothes that you had set aside for your next day at this internship, but they would have to do for now. They looked similar to what you were already wearing, but you weren’t picky about clothing.

Rushing back out of your door, you quickly locked it before hopping onto the awaiting palm of Isabella. She raised you towards her soft face, emerald eyes trained on you with a flash of concern in them. Her plump lips were curled into a sheepish smile, still obviously feeling guilty from stepping on you, before remembering that you two were running late. She rushed out of Greentower Apartments towards her car, her speed jostling you in her hand, but she managed to keep her hand steady enough to prevent you from falling.

Climbing into her car, Isabella gently lowered you into the cup holder and started the car. As she sped off towards Martinez, Anderson and Roberts, it was only around a ten minute drive.
You and Isabella chatted during the drive, although Isabella was clearly distracted by the prospect of being late on the first day.

Before long you had arrived at the office building. Looking up to it as Isabella rushed towards the building, you remembered that the offices for Martinez, Anderson and Roberts was on the third floor.
Isabella rushed past the security desk, clearly too stressed to notice a security guard saying hello, before pushing onto the elevator.

Stepping off the elevator on the third floor, Isabella rushed towards the receptionist, only to stop herself before almost crashing into Diane Martinez, one of your new bosses, and the person who you were currently late to meet with!

As Isabella steadied herself, you looked towards Diane, who’s blue eyes were trained on you with a look of irritation, most likely for being late. She was standing, hands on her wide hips, tapping her high heeled foot in annoyance. Her ponytail bounced as she shifted her head to look down at you, exuding the same level of annoyance she had just displayed at Isabella, showing that neither of you would be getting away with this failing on your first day without her ire.

“And just where have you two been? You are fifteen minutes late, not a good look on your first day,” Diane said flatly.

“S-sorry ma’am. It’s just that I accidentally stood on Anthony so he had to go change before we could leave, it’s not hi-“ she was cut off by Diane.
“No excuses, and don’t you try to take the blame off of him, you are both late, so you’ll both have to make up for it. I don’t want any more slip ups from either of you today, understood?” You both nodded as she fumed. Clearly Diane was a woman who hated seeing her staff not giving 100% in her eyes, you made a mental note to not disappoint her again.

“Since you are both late I won’t have time to give you a tour of the facilities, so you’ll just have to pick it up as you go. I can’t have a tour eating into the time you’ll be spending on the work you’ve been assigned today,” she gazed down at you, and you stood as upright as you could on the unsteady surface of Isabella’s palm, both shaking with stress and slick with a thin layer of sweat, attempting to look as professional as possible. She continued. “Anthony, I’ll tell you your assignment first...”

You listened intently, not wanting to get any of this wrong on your first day, considering you were already on thin ice by the sounds of it.

1) “... you will be working with me today, I’ve got a meeting with a client and I’ll need you to take notes for me, I’ll need you to keep them as detailed as possible since this is a high profile client and we cannot afford to get any details wrong with their case.” Diane plucks you from Isabella’s hand and leaves immediately to go meet with this client, hopefully you’ll be able to keep up and not disappoint your new boss.
2) “... you have been assigned to work with Mia Anderson. She was the only partner to vote against taking you on so you’ll need to impress her. She is in the process of building a case that you should be interested in, it’s a class action lawsuit on behalf of a group of tiny workers who say they were taken advantage of by their boss.” You are taken to Mia’s office, who is currently at her desk pouring over notes. You’ll need to work incredibly hard to impress her, considering she seemed to look down on you as a tiny in your interview. You had to wonder why she of all people had taken on this case, she didn’t seem the type to fight for tiny rights.
3) “... you’ve been assigned to join Olivia Roberts in court. You’ll be expected to help pull documents as she needs them, and observing how she carries herself in court should help give you an idea of what the trials that we take on function like.” Your breath gets caught in your throat as you get handed to Olivia, a vision of beauty. She leaves the office to head to court with you, and you get to watch her work her magic in court.
4) “... while I’m out meeting with a client, you and Isabella will need to do some research for a case that most of the practice is working on. I’ll have one of our first year associates oversee you two.” She beckons over a familiar face to you, Rebecca Lewis, your high school bully, and new coworker.
5) Diane assigns you to do something else (Writers Choice).
11.title: First day at Martinez, Anderson and Roberts

114.content:
Isabella looked down at you excitedly. You 'd both be working together, which would help alleviate the first day jitters you were both feeling. And a first year associate couldn't be half as scary as Diane.

"Ah, here she is now. Rebecca will take over from here. She is one of our most promising new associates, so make sure you do everything she says." Diane said, turning her back and walking out past the associate you'd be working for. You gulped at the sight of the all too familiar face.

You'd never imagined that Rebecca the first year law associate was Rebecca Lewis, your high school bully. You couldn't begin to count how many gym classes you'd spent in her shoe beneath her foot. And that was just the tip of the ice berg. She'd turned you into chewing gum during class, sat on you on the bus, turned you into a scrunchie to tie back her ponytail during volleyball practice... The list went on and on. You hadn't seen her for years, but you could tell by her eyes that she'd been expecting you.

"It's good to see you again Anthony." Rebecca said with a smile, holding out a single finger for you to shake.

Your words were still frozen in your throat, but you managed to lightly grip her finger.

"And you must be Isabella." Rebecca said, addressing the woman holding you in her hand. Isabella smiled and shook Rebecca's hand with her free one.

"You two know each other?" Isabella asked, surprised. She hadn't met Rebecca when she interviewed.

"Oh yeah, we go way back." Rebecca said. "Isn't that right Anthony?"

You didn't know what to say. You couldn't exactly tell Isabella everything Rebecca had done to you right in front of her. Without anything better to say, you just said "We went to high school together."

"Well don't think I'm going to play any favorites just because we're old friends." Rebecca teased, her eyes letting you know favoritism was the last thing you should be worried about.

"So what's the case?" Isabella asked excitedly, not noticing how afraid you were of Rebecca.

"Well, a tiny man named Henry Biggins is suing a Miss Alicia Jones for 'unlawful use'. He claims that while he was at the supermarket one day, she accidentally stepped on him and unknowingly carried him home. When she realized her mistake, she opted to keep him for her own personal satisfaction, molding and stretching him into whatever she needed from day to day."

You shuddered at the description of what amounted to your worst nightmare. The fact that the story was coming from the girl who had made a point of intentionally stepping on you in high school reminded you just how fragile your tiny existence was.

"How long did she keep him like that?" You asked.

"Allegedly, she kept him for 6 months." Rebecca explained. She says she thinks it couldn't have been more than 3 months, but isn't sure exactly."

"She isn't sure?" Isabella asked, surprised.

Rebecca nodded. "I have a quote from her here, let's see...." Rebecca said, flipping through her paperwork. "Yes, she said: 'When you're wearing a tiny person as a thong, it's so comfortable you don't even realize he's there.' And because of the allegations against her, she is counter suing, requesting that she be granted a usage license so she can go back to using him again."

Once again you couldn't help but shudder. You'd been stepped on or crushed dozens of times, but you'd only had the misfortune of being worn as a thong once. And it was Rebecca who'd worn him. She'd asked him to be her prom date to the senior prom. You'd known it was a trap, but she'd asked you with her foot hanging over your head. When you agreed, she'd slammed it down on you, squashing you flat, then formed you into a thong without a second's hesitation. Your dance partners at the prom that night were Rebecca's gigantic ass cheeks, something you'd had nightmares about for years after.

You shook the terrifying vision of Rebecca's bare ass cheeks out of your head. "Isn't that her admitting to keeping him as her thong though? Seems like an open and shut case?"

Rebecca smiled. "Far from it actually. There's a lot of points of contention, besides the disagreements about time. She argues that he implicitly volunteered to be her thong by looking up her skirt at the grocery store, nonverbally signalling he'd like to be one. He says this is ridiculous, and also brings up her other uses of him. He claims she has chewed him as gum, swallowing him on several occasions. He also says she has used him as an insole, a sweat rag, among other things. She says that being her thong is more intimate than any of those other things, so it shouldn't be relevant."

"Even if it's not open and shut, surely it shouldn't be too hard to defend him in this case?" You asked.

"Defend him?" Rebecca asked, raising her eyebrows. "We're representing Alicia in this case."

"What?! That's insane! He's the victim here!" You shouted.

This time, Isabella stepped in. "Everyone is entitled to representation Anthony. We don't get to decide who is guilty and who is innocent before the case."

"I'm glad you agree Isabella. I have some important research that I'll need both your help with." Rebecca explained.

"Whatever you need, we are ready to help." Isabella said, as eager as ever. You simply nodded, sure that your research would reveal that Alicia's case was impossible to defend.

"Ok Isabella, I want you to...."

1. "Wear Anthony as a thong for a while, and see if you really 'forget you're wearing him.'" Rebecca forms Anthony into a thong, with his face in the back facing Isabella's butt, then hands him to Isabella to put on.

2. "Help me with some paperwork. Anthony, you'll be interviewing Alicia to get some more information." Anthony is sent to meet with Alicia alone, and there's no telling what she'll do.

3. "Go study some other relevant cases, you can use the office next door. Anthony will help you." Rebecca leaves you alone for now, and you head off to do some research with Isabella. Maybe you'll get a chance to tell her the truth about Rebecca, assuming Isabella doesn't accidentally squish you first.
114.title: Research with Isabella and Rebecca

choices: Rebecca Lewis, your high school bully (RES)
12.content:
The booming sound that signalled someone knocking your door with the toe of their shoe caused your whole apartment to rattle.
You almost choked on your toothbrush as the floor of your apartment shook at the impact, knocking you to the ground.
You scrambled back to your feet and quickly finished brushing your teeth.

Walking back into the main room, you wondered who it could be at your door, you didn’t have any plans today and weren’t expecting anyone. The kick to your door was also much harder than needed to get your attention, so you were wondering whether that was intentional or not.
If it wasn’t intentional you’d need to remind whoever it was to be more careful next time, and if it was intentional, then you worried about who it was that was trying to get your attention.
You noticed with a sigh that the force of the “knock” at your door had caused many of your things had fallen to the floor, you would need to put everything back in place once you dealt with whoever was at the door.

As you approached the door, you glanced out the window and saw a colossal pair of white, well worn sneakers. The owners feet were completely hidden by those and a pair of white socks which stretched high up their leg, well past your line of sight, and the feet were planted so close to your window you had no way of looking up to see who it was.
The sight of the imposing pair of feet so close to your apartment set you on edge, having a natural aversion to feet from past experiences throughout your life.

Sighing, and hoping this wouldn’t be an unpleasant visit, you opened your door and stepped out to greet your visitor.

1) You looked up and locked eyes with the scowling face of your landlady, Taylor Smith. You couldn’t be sure whether she was upset with you or if it was just her general dislike of you that was causing her to look angry at the moment. A brief fear that your mom may have been late with your rent flashed across your mind, but you pushed it back, she had never been late before so you hoped this wasn’t her first time.
2) Your heart drops as you look up into the familiar face of your high school bully and new coworker, Rebecca Lewis. She must have gotten your address from the records at Martinez, Anderson and Roberts, but why was she here. You hadn’t spoken with her since high school, so you hoped her attitude towards you had changed, although her malicious grin told you otherwise. (RESERVED FOR ODYSSEUS)
3) Your sister, Katherine, was staring down at you, smiling. This couldn’t be good for you, she was generally disinterested in you unless she wanted something, whether it was her thinking she could get you to help her with something or if she was just bored, regardless her reason for visiting would likely be for her benefit and very unpleasant for you.
4) You sigh with relief as all your fears are quashed by the sight of the smiling face of your oldest sister, Sarah. You aren’t sure the reason for her visit, but at least you know she wouldn’t do anything harmful to you.
5) The person who you find at the door isn’t someone who is immediately familiar to you. It may be someone who you know but haven’t seen for a while, or it could be a complete stranger. Your mind is slightly hazy from not being awake for very long. (Writer’s choice)
12.title: Sudden Knock at the Door

choices: Serving Taylor to pay your debt
121.content:
As you approach the door to see who it was, you saw the foot sat directly outside your window begin to tap in impatience.

“I know you’re in there Mr Little, we need to discuss the fact that your rent is a week overdue,” you recognised the flat tone of your landlady, Taylor Smith. You silently cursed your mom’s airheadedness, she had probably forgot to pay your rent, and now you knew you were going to pay for it with Taylor. She already didn’t like you because you wanted to be a lawyer, so this was extra aggravation that you didn’t need to give her.

Your fearful thoughts were interrupted as she spoke once again, this time sounding even more impatient.
“Don’t keep me waiting, I’m trying to be nice here, but I’m a busy woman and I can’t afford to waste any more time on a deadbeat lawyer tenant than I already have.”

Sterling your nerves, you opened the door and stepped out to face her.
Taylor Smith was an intimidating sight from the ground. Her well worn sneakers were sat less than six inches from where you were standing, and each one was large enough to cover half of your apartment. Looking up past them you could see her legs, covered by a pair of blue jeans, which seemed to stretch for miles above you. Her face was currently peeking past her massive breasts, which strained against what should be a loose fitting black blouse. Her black curls framed her face, the small part of it that you could see furrowed in an irritated expression. She was not a patient woman clearly.
Her demeanour and way of speaking indicated a working class background. Maybe she inherited wealth from somewhere and decided to invest in property? It didn’t really matter in this moment, and you were a little too afraid to ask.

Pressing her massive chest down so she could get a better view of you, she stared down at you intimidatingly. She could have easily bent down to get a better view at you, but you could tell that she was staying at her full height just to unnerve you, and it was working.

The silence carried over you two, and she cocked an eyebrow, clearly expecting you to explain yourself.

“Um... I-I didn’t know my rent was overdue, Mrs Smith...” you stammered, your throat suddenly very dry. “My mom normally takes care of it, if you give her a call I’m sure she can sort it out...”

A sudden flare of Taylor’s nostrils as she exhaled in annoyance told you this excuse wasn’t going to fly with her.
“I didn’t ask for an excuse, and second of all it’s Miss, not Mrs,” she huffed. “I expect my rent on time Mr Little, you wouldn’t think to take advantage of my kind nature, would you? I know it’s in most lawyer’s natures to be self serving but surely even you know that it’s illegal to not pay your rent. A few days late I could maybe understand but it’s been over a week! However, I will contact your mother about this, clearly you aren’t grown up enough to handle your own finances and would prefer to sponge off of her.”

Her jabs were starting to make you angry, you wouldn’t sit here and take this from her, even if she did scare the hell out of you.
“Come on, that’s not exactly fair, you know I’m starting an internship to get a job specifically so I don’t have to rely on my mom!” Your outburst surprised Taylor, whose eyes widened slightly.

“Well I’m glad to hear that Mr Little, I was going to have to ask your mother for reimbursement for lost income due to the lateness of the rent, but if you’re trying to be so self sufficient I think I have a better idea of how you can pay me back the extra amount. I’ll only take the original rent fees from your mother if you do this for me,” her tone gave away that she had perhaps underestimated you, but you swear you could also hear a faint mocking undertone in it as well.

Deciding that you had to prove yourself in some way to Taylor, plus it would save your mom having to pay any extra fees, despite it being her mistake in the first place, you decided to agree.
Nodding your head, you saw a small smile creep across Taylor’s face.
“Lovely, maybe you’re not as selfish as other lawyers I’ve had the displeasure of knowing. Now, lock your door and lets get going,” she said, and expectantly watched you walk back to your door and lock it.

Before you could even turn back to face her, you let out a yelp as two of her fingers suddenly pinched your torso and you rocketed up into the air as she stood back to her full height.
As you flew past the apartments above you, you saw several of your tiny neighbours looking out at you sympathetically. They had obviously heard the whole conversation since Taylor wasn’t exactly being quiet about it, and they also were fully aware of her dislike for you since that also wasn’t exactly a secret.

You were pulled upwards, stopping right in front of Taylor’s face. You forced yourself not to look down to the seemingly bottomless abyss of her cleavage, on display due to her low neckline, not wanting to upset her. You focused on her face, which was currently showing a neutral, almost analytical expression. Her green eyes looked you up and down, and it made you feel incredibly uncomfortable.

Without another word, she lowered you down and her face was obscured by her chest. You were placed in one of the pockets of her jeans, sealing you in relative darkness, apart from the small amount of light that filtered in through the stitching of her jeans.

You felt yourself pressed tightly between the tight jeans and her thigh as she began to walk, and eventually felt the rumble of her cars engine. As she drove off towards her next destination, you hoped that you wouldn’t be kept in this warm, claustrophobic space for too long. You also weren’t sure exactly where she was taking you, you would guess to her home, but you couldn’t exactly be sure.

*****

You weren’t sure how long the car journey lasted, but eventually you heard the engine turn off and felt the pressure of her walking again. As she walked, you heard her speaking to someone, but the deafening sound of the shifting fabric around you drowned it out enough that you couldn’t make out the conversation.

You were once again gripped tightly between her fingers as she grabbed you from the confines of her pocket. The breath was forced from your lungs when your torso was flattened by the probing fingers as she wasn’t able to see exactly where you were, rendering you unable to make a sound as you were rocketed once again up to her face.

In her other hand she was holding a phone to her ear, and as you heard the distorted sound of someone on the other end of it, you could tell it was the familiar voice of your mother.
“... excellent Mrs Little, I’m glad we have gotten that all sorted out, I’ll let you know once I receive the money in my account, and I’m sure your little Anthony will be of great help to me with this favour. Thanks, bye.”

She hanged up the phone, and slid it into her purse, before turning her attention back to you.

“Your mom tells me the rent will be on it’s way soon. Such a pleasant woman, it’s a shame her son turned out to be a bloodsucking lawyer,” her barbed words almost got another rise out of you, but she continued before you could answer. “But, if you do well on this job for me, maybe you can change my opinion of you.”

You weren’t sure exactly what it was Taylor was expecting you to do for her, but you hoped it wouldn’t interfere with your internship starting in a few days, although damaging your law career would probably be something she’d see as a bonus.


1) “I need you to do some legal work for me, free of charge of course. Even though I despise lawyers, in my line of work you come to need them from time to time, but I promise you this, if you slip up on this I will find another way to punish you.” What exactly does Taylor need you to help her with?
2) “I think that a selfish little lawyer needs to learn some humility before you can get to taking advantage of people who you come to represent. So I think to make up for my lost income, you’ll be doing some hard labour for me till your mom’s money comes in.” Taylor turns you into her temporary servant until your mom’s rent cheque clears, but will your airheaded parent forget to pay it again?
3) “My daughter, Gabrielle, has her 21st birthday coming up, and for the life of me I can’t decide what to get her as a present. So I think you’ll do, if your mom’s as much of an airhead as she seems, she’ll likely forget all about you, and I’m sure your apartment won’t stay vacant for long, I filled it quickly after she took a liking to the last tenant.” Taylor gives you to Gabrielle to do whatever she wants with you.
121.title: Taylor Smith, Your Landlady

choices: Meeting someone in the laundry room
Meeting someone in another place (Writer’s Choice)
13.content:
As you finish in the bathroom, what it was that you had planned for today still hadn’t come to you, so you decided to check your calendar. Looking at it you saw that you had no plans for today, which was actually pretty rare for you these days, and you likely wouldn’t get another day free for a while once you started your internship.

After thinking about how you could spend your day, you decided it would probably be a good idea to get to know one of your neighbours. You had talked to some of them a few times, but you wouldn’t consider any of them as friends yet. You hadn’t made very many friends since you finished university, and those that you did have were moving on with their post university lives, some were moving, others were too busy since they were now focused on their careers. So you decided that making friends with some of your neighbours would be a good idea.

You sat down and thought over your potential choices for who to go and visit.

The first choice that popped into your head were the two women who lived across the hall from you, who you were already fairly well aquatinted with, Bonnie Fraser and Violet Quinn.
They were already living in the apartment across from you when you moved in, and through the few interactions you have had with them they both seemed nice.

Bonnie is originally from Scotland, which her vernacular and faint accent gave away when you first met her. She is absolutely beautiful and informed you that she is a dance instructor. Every interaction with her has highlighted her friendly nature, as well as a large amount of playfulness and flirtation on her part. She actually makes you fairly nervous, you are not used to that kind of attention from women, combined by the fact that she is very out of your league, making it difficult for you to talk to her.
She would be a good option because you know she is friendly, and she lives right across the hall from you, plus you haven’t seen her leave yet so she is likely still in her apartment.

Her roommate, Violet Quinn, was another good option. You hadn’t talked to her as much as her roommate, due to her being much less outgoing than Bonnie, but her shy and timid personality was one you found easier to deal with than the high intensity and energetic exuded by Bonnie. You know that she is a baker, and is still in college training for a culinary degree.
You had just watched her leave her apartment, however, and you weren’t sure when she would be back, so you would have to keep an eye out if you chose her.

The last person in Greentower that you had any experience with was the person you had just this morning watched trample on a tiny guy, whether out of a lack of awareness or a lack of care you couldn’t be sure, Chloe Kim.
Chloe was something of an enigma to you, from what you have gleaned about her, she spends a considerable amount of time on her computer, between her programming job and playing video games in her spare time.
Whenever you have talked to her she was nice enough, and talked passionately about her interests. She was always pleasant to you, but on other times, like this morning, you have seen her treat tinies very callously. It was almost as if she wasn’t willing to put in the effort to avoid tinies when they got in her path. One thing in her favour is that she never talked down to you.
Another benefit of going to see her is that it would give you the opportunity to rescue Andrew, who you had watched get squashed into the treads of her shoes as she walked past your apartment.

The last option you can think of would be to go to one of the communal areas of the building and try and meet someone there, such as the laundry room. That had it’s own risks but there was always a good chance of finding someone there. There was a designated tiny section that had areas where you could hand wash your clothes, so maybe you could get someone’s attention from the safety of there, you did need to do some laundry so it would kill two birds with one stone.

1) You decide to go across the hall to spend some time with the flirty, energetic Bonnie Fraser.
2) You wait on the shy, sweet Violet Quinn to come back, planning to catch her in the hallway.
3) You make the trek down the hall towards Chloe Kim’s apartment, hoping to get to know the careless, geeky girl better.
4) You decide the best place to meet someone new would be to go to the laundry room. Grabbing a hamper filled with your dirty laundry, you make your way down the hall.
5) You decide to try and meet someone in another area of the building (Writer’s choice).
13.title: Free Day, Get to Know One of Your Neighbours

choices: Unaware Bonnie carries you to dance class
131.content:
You decided to visit Bonnie, knowing that she was the closest option that you had, since she was likely still in her apartment and you weren’t sure when Violet would get back.

Leaving your apartment and locking the door behind you, you stepped out onto the section of the floor designated for tinies to walk on, and gazed across the expanse of hallway to the other side, where another safe haven ran alongside the wall. To get to Bonnie’s apartment you would have to cross the dangerous part of the hall that had the risk of being crushed by a passing normal sized person. You had already seen Andrew get crushed in the very spot you were about to cross this morning.
You looked left and right, making sure that no one was coming, you could see a woman off to your right, maybe 4 doors down the hall from you, but she was talking to another woman at the door of her apartment and hopefully wasn’t moving any time soon.

Deciding now was a good time to go, you began to quickly walk across the expanse of floor towards the monolithic door of Bonnie’s apartment. Your heart pounded in your chest, the prospect of being tread on by an unaware woman terrifying you after how much similar things happening to you set you back during your law degree.
Once you reached the middle of the floor, you heard a sentence that sent chills down your spine.
“Ok girl, see ya later,” you turned to see the giantess who was talking to her friend down the hall had ended their conversation and was beginning to walk in your direction, each step sending a booming vibration across the floor towards you.
You started to run towards Bonnie’s door, hoping to reach the relative safety of the tiny lane before she crossed your path.

After thirty seconds of running you had almost made it, but the unaware girl was almost on top of you, her booming footsteps were starting to throw you off balance due to their proximity. With one last ditch effort to save yourself from being flattened you threw yourself the remaining distance and landed on the safe haven of the tiny designated path, just as her foot landed two inches from your prone form and kept going.

You sighed with relief at avoiding a crushing, and then turned your attention to the gigantic door in front of you.
There would be no way of getting Bonnie’s attention from out here, since Greentower’s apartments weren’t equipped with tiny-friendly doorbells that you had seen in other places, so the only option would be to go under her door and get her attention from there.
There was a strange phenomenon when tiny guys tried to get normal sized peoples attention where their voices could reach them despite the size difference, but it didn’t always work, and usually never worked when the woman was distracted. You hoped things would work out in your favour today.

Crawling through the gap under the door, you were met with the sight of a nicely decorated living room. Violet and Bonnie had added many personal touches to the room that made it warm and welcoming. You spotted a shelf off in the distance which held several dance trophies that Bonnie had presumably won, as well as several cookbooks that Violet had placed on a lower shelf.
Immediately to your right as you entered was a shoe rack, which had several pairs of shoes on it, the varying sizes suggesting that it was a mixture of both Bonnie’s and Violet’s shoes.
To your left was a massive couch, which you were at the side of, and standing between you and it was an enormous gym bag, which was open. You could see a pair of black tights draped over the side of the bag, as if they had been thrown in but not landed perfectly inside. This was obviously Bonnie’s bag that she kept her dance clothes in.

Your observation of the room was interrupted as you heard booming footsteps coming from what you assume was the kitchen. Moments later the towering form of Bonnie strolled into the room, drinking from a water bottle as she walked.
Her curly ginger hair was currently pulled back into a ponytail, which draped down to her middle back. She was wearing some casual clothes, a simple black top which hugged her chest tightly and had a fairly deep neckline, and a pair of orange shorts which hugged her shapely rear and left most of her long, toned legs on full display. Her bare feet compressed the carpet beneath her as she walked.
She hummed a small tune as she drank and moved closer to the couch, grabbing a remote for the tv as she went.
You decided it would be a good idea to get her attention now before she put on the tv.

“Bonnie!” You yelled as loudly as you could, hoping to not wear your throat out by shouting for a prolonged period, and her icy blue eyes darted around the room, looking for the source of the noise. After several seconds of looking, her eyes settled on you, your waving arms catching her attention, and her pale, freckled face lit up with a smile.

“Hiya little guy, what’s a wee thing like yourself doing in here? You’re not trying to spy on me, are ya?” She giggled, obviously joking, before making her way over to you. Her thudding footsteps were lighter than many of the giantesses you were familiar with, surprising given her height, but even still they threw you off balance slightly. Stopping directly in front of you, her toes wiggling excitedly, Bonnie stood tall above you and did nothing for a few seconds and looked down at you. It was honestly an intimidating sight, even though you knew she wasn’t malicious in any way towards you.
She bent down and placed her free hand down, palm up, and gestured for you to climb on. Raising back to her full height she raised you up to her face and took a close look at you, eyes glinting in recognition now that she could see you closely.
“Oh, hiya Anthony, what brings you by?” She smiled, her faint accent laced throughout her words.

“I had a free day and just came by to see if you wanted to hang out for a bit, maybe get to know each other a bit better?” You replied, which caused Bonnie to grin slightly.

“Ooh, so you want to ‘get to know me better’ do you?” She winked. “Very forward of you Anthony, you cheeky devil!”

You quickly started stammering to try and correct what you assumed was a misunderstanding on her part, before she chuckled and continued, cutting you off.

“I’m only kidding Anthony... or am I?” She winked, before moving to the couch.

Depositing you on the armrest near the door, you looked behind you at the long drop down to the open gym bag, filled with Bonnie’s dance gear, with caution.

Bonnie stretched out on the couch. Laying so her feet were placed at your end of the couch and her head was propped against the other one, propping her head up with a pillow.

“I was planning on chilling and watching the telly for a little while anyway,” she said, holding up the tv remote before setting it down on the arm rest behind her head. “But I’d say that some conversation would be better. God, you just look so cute down there. I hope you don’t mind my feet down there with you, haven’t had a chance to shower yet, they aren’t too smelly, are they?”

It was true that her feet did smell a bit, and there was a light sheen of sweat on them, likely from an earlier workout, but it wasn’t unbearable and you didn’t want to be rude so you just shook your head.
“N-no, it’s fine.”

She smiled, and leaned back against the pillow behind her head, getting comfortable.
“So, what did you want to talk about?” She asked.

1) You and Bonnie spend some time getting to know each other, and have a pleasant conversation with no incidents.
2) You and Bonnie spend some time getting to know each other, but she starts flirting and teasing you.
3) Bonnie gets a call from her dance studio about covering a class, she accidentally knocks you into her bag without noticing and takes you with her without realising.
131.title: Reaching Bonnie’s Apartment

14.content:
As you finish brushing your teeth, you remembered that you had plans with someone today, but you still couldn’t remember what they were.
Walking out of the bathroom now as you had finished in there, you decide to check your calendar to shed some light on what exactly it was you had planned today.
You hoped it was something you’d find fun and wasn’t anything like helping your mom out with something, you didn’t get many free days and it would look like you would be getting even less after your internship starts.

Glancing around your apartment as you walked towards the side of the room where your calendar was hanging and you briefly thought that it would maybe be a good thing if you had no plans, it was a bit of a mess.
Glancing at your calendar...

1) You realised with a smile that you had planned to have lunch with your oldest sister, Sarah, at a local cafe. She would be coming by to pick you up soon, so you decided to go and get ready before she arrived.
2) You groaned as you realised that, you assume in some insane lapse of judgement, that you had agreed to help your mom organise her wardrobe. You weren’t sure exactly why she thought you would be any help whatsoever, or why you even agreed to it, but you couldn’t back out now and she would be here soon. Sighing, you sat down and waited on her to arrive.
3) You realised that, while you didn’t have any plans throughout the day, you had been invited over for dinner by Bonnie and Violet, your neighbours across the hall. You didn’t know them overly well, but this would be a good opportunity to get to know them better. Violet was also studying for a culinary degree at college, so you knew that the food would be excellent.
4) You remembered that you had promised your landlady, Taylor, that you would help out her daughter, Gabrielle, with a project for her college course. She was studying cosmetology so you weren’t exactly sure what she expected you to help with, as well as finding it strange that she had asked you to help considering that you had never even seen her daughter, never mind spoken to her. In the end you agreed because you figured it would help improve Taylor’s opinion of you since she didn’t seem to like you very much after finding out you are an aspiring lawyer.
5) The note in your calendar isn’t entirely clear, so you spend some time figuring out exactly what it means (Writer’s choice).
14.title: You Remember That You Have Plans

choices: She heads home immediately and you two start working on the wardrobe.
She heads home and you two + Katherine work on the wardrobe.
She gets sidetracked and runs errands, or totally forgets about you.
142.content:
Glancing at your calendar, you saw written in bold, “HELP MOM WITH HER WARDROBE” in all capital letters. You let out an exasperated groan as you read the words, wishing that you had never agreed to this favor in the first place. Nine times out of ten, you wouldn’t have. But you knew despite how big of an airheaded menace your mom could be, she did love you after all. And you felt guilty about spending so little time with her over the past few years as you finished up your college degree. Sighing once more, you knew that backing out would only lead to feelings of guilt on your part. So you sat down on your bed and waited, knowing that she would arrive quickly to get this grueling day started.

*KNOCK KNOCK*
Two powerful slams into your front door shook your entire room, as well as the other tiny apartments stacked on top of yours. A few items fell off of shelves, and your furniture slid about a foot backwards from the vibration. You thought to yourself that you should tell her to be more gentle when she knocks on your door in the future. Or better yet, actually take the time to bend over and knock with her finger like a polite person. But you knew that request would just go in one ear and out the other thanks to her carefree attitude.

You walked to your front door shortly after the second knock and swung it open. What you saw upon opening your door took a mere moment to process, but nevertheless you had nowhere near enough time to react to it. First you saw a loose, beaten down flip flop laying on the ground carelessly off to the side, but then immediately you saw your mom’s gigantic, bare, foot swinging like a pendulum towards your front door. Likely in an effort to “knock” once more. However, instead of hitting the solid front door with her big toe like she had previously, her massive digit swung rapidly through the tiny open space of the doorway, just squeezing through the frame to keep moving. The rest of her toes soon hit the wall to the side of the door, stopping her movement, but not before the damage was done. With you right in the line of fire, her toe slammed into your defenseless body powerfully.

You didn’t even have time to brace yourself as the digit which was quite literally as tall as you were, and three times as wide, made contact with your body. Of course, you felt your head and upper body get jammed awkwardly between her sweaty foot flesh and the underside of her toenail. The lower half of your body dangled freely while your upper half was crammed into the tight, gross space. As you cozied up in the same place as random particles of fuzz, dirt, and toe jam, you were immediately reminded of the unbelievable size discrepancy between yourself and any regular sized woman. Sighing, you prepared yourself for a long, long day.

Deborah pulled her big toe out of the space that it had just swung through, feeling a small sensation against the tip of her toe briefly before. She first placed her foot back on the ground beside the other one and bent over, expecting to see you standing in the doorway ready to greet her. But when she saw nothing but empty space, she was a bit confused. Just then, she felt an awkward sensation of something caught underneath her toenail, and she finally glanced down. Deb quite literally had to press her comically large breasts into her chest to see all the way to her feet, but thankfully when she did she noticed your minuscule body, flapping half off of her toe like a peeled up little sticker.

You heard a gasp of realization far above your crumpled body and mentally rolled your eyes in relief. But then, of course, her absolutely carefree attitude kicked in, and she followed the gasp with a few stifled giggles.

“Hehehe, oh shoot Anthony, already? How did this even happen?” She said while lifting her foot off of the ground. She took a moment to stare at your body before continuing, “I can’t believe you can almost fit completely in there. I think if you just smushed yourself a bit more you totally could! Remember that in case we ever play hide and go seek or something! I might never find you in there, at least until I clipped my toenails!” Deborah finished her idiotic train of logic with a hearty chuckle before finally reaching down and yanking your body out of the tight space. You felt your head pop free and finally saw the image of your mom instead of the image of her toe. She was wearing an absurdly revealing outfit for a 45 year old to wear, namely a pair of far-too-small jean shorts as well as a tight white tank top with a loose blouse, unbuttoned over it. Groaning twice as hard for the idiotic meeting you just had with your mom’s big toe, as well as her inappropriate outfit. You turned around from your spot dangling between her fingers and saw a number of your neighbors standing in front of their windows, staring daggers at your mom’s body. You raised your arms at them and signaled them to quit ogling. Some did, many did not. But you were used to it. As much as you hated it, it would be a lie for you to say that your mother wasn’t a good looking woman. Dealing with the wandering gazes of your tiny friends and associates was just par for the course.

“Uhh hey mom, it’s been a while! I know I haven’t seen you too much lately so today I’m all yours!” You said with your now reformed face up to her. Part of you hoped that your wording there wouldn’t come back to bite you in the ass later. She smiled powerfully as she surprisingly carefully reached into your apartment and closed the front door. You would have to deal with the damage that her gigantic foot did when you got back later.

“Sweetie I missed you!” She exclaimed as she predictably brought you in for an overwhelming hug, if you could even call it that. She simply pressed you tightly against her upper chest, squishing you into the top of her boobs before pulling you away. “I’m so glad you were able to help me out today with my wardrobe! I need you to use your smarts to help me decide what I should keep and what I should toss out!”

“Sure! That sounds nice and easy!” You responded. In reality it did. You were worried that you would be roped into some strange favor that would be far more demeaning, but so far this actually didn’t sound too bad! Maybe the day wouldn’t go too badly after all.

Almost as if fate was laughing in the face of your brief moment of optimism, without another word your mom opened up her purse and dropped you nearly a foot into the dark abyss of its innards. You landed with a thud next to a pack of breath mints and some keys, the latter of which her hand reached in and pulled out just as quickly as it had dropped you in. You looked up at the last remaining sliver of light and saw your mom’s smiling face looking down at you, not realizing how degrading the act of dropping you into her purse like a random knick knack was.

“Alright sweetie, you ride in there, and we’ll get going!” She said before sealing your fate by zipping you into utter darkness. Why couldn’t she just act normal for once?

How does this day continue with your ditz of a mother?
142.title: A Day with Mom

info.brief_description: A tiny, malleable guy attempts to navigate life and an internship at a law firm
info.description:
Background (Written by Hectic)

A lot has changed in the past 25 years since the great shrinking epidemic swept across the world. In an event that some called a medical mystery and others called an act of god, a type of shrinking virus spread to every corner of the earth, affecting part of the population while leaving another part completely fine. Those who fell victim to this virus rapidly shrunk down to one inch tall, but at the same time gained a strange durability and malleability that has baffled scientists and doctors alike. However, the tiny people were not ones to complain about these newfound characteristics, as they were the only things preventing their lives from being taken by a stray step or anything else of that nature. The third most interesting aspect about this inexplicable shrinking is the fact that only men seem to have suffered from it, with women across the world remaining completely unaffected.

From the first day of the shrinking event it was expected that society would change drastically, and while it definitely did, surprisingly much of it remained the same. There was no evil women’s takeover or forced servitude of the now smaller men. For the most part, many men who had a job that did not require physical labor of any kind were able to continue living somewhat normal lives. Certain laws were put into place which prevented too much malicious behavior from befalling the tiny men, but these were really only enforced when a woman would purposefully try to kill, kidnap, or otherwise torture them. The vast majority of the time women would get away with any accidents between them and the tiny guys with a small slap on the wrists.

You
You have never known life without the existence of tiny men, being born one yourself. You didn’t have the easiest time growing up, no tiny guys have, but you have done better than many considering you made it this far.
You recently graduated with a law degree from Owentown University but, due to a considerable amount of your time at university spent missing classes due to being squashed in various places, you didn’t have the best grades. This led most law firms to reject you, the combination of middling grades and lack of experience going against you. You managed to secure an internship at “Martinez, Anderson and Roberts”, a local law firm, in the hopes of gaining some experience.
You live in Owentown, in an apartment building which has been retrofitted to house both tiny guys and normal sized people, which you moved into shortly after finishing university, so you haven’t had a chance to get to know many of your neighbours yet. Strangely it seemed that the previous tenant had just disappeared and hadn’t been seen for a few months before you moved in.
Our story starts just as you are about to start your first day as an intern.

Characters

Anthony Little (You)- The main character, and 22 years old. You have pale skin and are decently fit, owing to a lot of running and climbing to avoid the various hazards that plague the life of a tiny man like yourself. You have a head of short black hair and blue eyes, you would consider yourself fairly average when it comes to attractiveness, although many women find most tiny men cute so it has never held you back too much.
You are very intelligent, although easily distracted, and you are able to find creative solutions to most of the problems you find yourself in. You are kind and friendly towards others, often to a fault, sometimes being unable to say no to a request that you know will be unpleasant for you. You are also guilty of having wandering eyes on occasion when dealing with the incredibly attractive women who seem to find their way into your life.


Greentower Apartments
The apartment building you live in. The building is three floors, but your “apartment” is located on the bottom floor. You live in a tiny habitation box that has been installed in an old storage closet which has had the door removed. There are several of these boxes stacked on top of each other, with an elevator connecting each of them to the floor level. You live in the bottom block.
The habitation boxes themselves are like mini apartments, with both electricity and running water. As far as accommodation for tiny guys goes, they are on the better end of them.

Bonnie Fraser- One of the two women that live across the hall from you. She is 23 years old, stands at 5’11” tall and is originally from Scotland, which is obvious from her faint accent and occasional Scottish vernacular sneaking it’s way into her speech.
Her incredibly pale, freckled face is framed by a mane of curly, ginger hair. Her icy blue eyes and full lips project an almost constant air of friendliness and optimism. She is playful and friendly, and from the few conversations you have had with her since you moved in it is obvious she finds tiny guys adorable, as she was incredibly flirty with you.
She works at a nearby dance studio as an instructor, and is often seen dressed in her tight clothing that she wears to her work. Her tight clothing shows off her curvy body, which has been enhanced by the toning it has received through years of dancing.

Violet Quinn- Roommate of Bonnie Fraser, and lives in the apartment across from you. She is 22 years old and is 5’9” tall. She has short blonde hair and pale skin. Her brown eyes and flawless skin, as well as her physique attract attention that she is usually very uncomfortable with. She is a shy and timid girl, and constantly wears baggy clothes that do little to hide her enormous curves.
She has an enormous sweet tooth and hates exercise, a fact that she owes her curves to, possessing quite possibly the biggest ass you have ever seen.
She is in her final year of a culinary degree and works part time at a local bakery.
Your few interactions with her have been fairly awkward, her shyness making holding a conversation with her difficult. She seems to talk fine with Bonnie, however, so it seems that her shyness fades once she gets to know people.

Chloe Kim- One of the residents of Greentower Apartments, she lives down the hall from you. She is a 20 year old woman who’s parents emigrated from South Korea before she was born. She has short black hair and a fair complexion, with emerald green eyes. She stands at 5’5” tall.
She has a form that you could tell was once petite, but a sedentary lifestyle with little exercise has led to her putting on a fair bit of weight. Her weight is mostly concentrated around her hips, giving her a sizeable rear end.
Chloe works remotely as a programmer and earns extra income by streaming on Twitch. She loves video games and can talk about them endlessly. She also loves food, particularly Mexican food, she finds spice something of a challenge and enjoys eating the spiciest stuff she can get her hands on.
She has an unusual attitude towards tinies, she is relatively unobservant around them, often squashing them without realising. This isn’t through any ditziness on her part, she is just unwilling to make the effort to look out for them. She is also unwilling to go out of her way to help them once she has squashed them. She’s not mean, per say, just lazy. When she isn’t squashing them she is fairly kind and talkative normally, treating tinies no differently than she would a normal sized person.

Taylor Smith- Your new landlady. She is a 42 years old African American woman with short, curly black hair framing her youthful face, which makes her look years younger than she actually is. She is 5’8” and is one of the curviest women you have ever met, primarily in her monumental chest, which is one of the largest you have ever seen.
She is incredibly warm and welcoming, and was towards you when you initially moved in, but after finding out you were a lawyer her demeanour towards you changed. Now she looks at you with disdain. She hasn’t said or done anything to you yet, but you are definitely afraid to step out of line with her.

Gabrielle Smith- The daughter of your landlady, Taylor Smith. She is 20 years old, 5,8” and shares a similar skin tone to her mother. Unlike her mother, her hair is long and flowing, reaching down to the middle of her back. She has been blessed by her mother’s genetics and sports some impressive curves as well.
You have yet to properly meet her but you have seen her in passing. Little do you know that she is the reason your apartment was available since she decided that the previous tenant would be better as her insole. She is incredibly cruel and enjoys torturing tinies, a fact that her doting mother is fully aware of and simply sweeps under the rug.
She is currently at college studying cosmetology and loves to do both her own and her mother’s makeup, as well as practice all of the various things that she learns at college on her mother.


Martinez, Anderson and Roberts
The law firm you are starting an internship at. It is a decently sized law firm and is the largest one in Owentown, it is located in the downtown area, on the third floor of an office building. It is only around ten minutes from your apartment to a normal sized person.
You interviewed with all three of the partners in a meeting, and two of the three of them voted in favour of giving you a shot as an intern. You need to be sure to keep a good impression with the partners, as they will decide at the end of the year whether they will take you on as an associate.

Diane Martinez- One of the partners at M.A.R., and one of the two partners who voted to take you on. She is 36 years old and has blue eyes, dark tanned skin with long, black hair almost constantly pulled back in a ponytail. She is relatively short, standing at 5’5”, but that still makes her miles taller than someone like you, and sports fairly prominent curves, which are untoned from lack of exercise due to her job keeping her busy.
She has worked incredibly hard to get to the position of partner, and acts with utmost professionalism. She is incredibly kind and considerate, but that attitude fades towards anyone who embarrasses her or makes her look bad in front of a client.

Mia Anderson- One of the partners at M.A.R., and the only partner who voted not to take you on as an intern. She is 38 years old, with pale skin and blue eyes. Her auburn hair is constantly tied up in a bun. She is what many people would describe as a short stack, standing at only 5’2” and has very large curves, which look all the more massive on her small frame. She is always seen sporting very expensive business wear which is stretched to their limits by her curves.
She views tiny guys as bugs and finds them distasteful. She thinks that by taking you on as an intern the firm will damage it’s image, so she will take any opportunity to convince one of the other partners that they should fire you.

Olivia Roberts- The third partner at M.A.R., she voted in favour of taking you on as an intern. She is the youngest of the managing partners at the firm, at 31 years old. Her gorgeous face, deep blue eyes and plump lips are framed by blonde hair which flows down to her unbelievably wide hips.
During your interview with the partners you had to stop yourself from staring at her. She always shows off her generous curves and beautifully tanned skin by wearing business dresses that hug them tightly, and shows off a deep neckline, as well as a good amount of her legs.
Between her good looks, massive curves and flirtatious nature she is capable of getting anyone to do whatever she wants, which is what she owes to her success as a lawyer. She voted in favour of hiring you because she finds tiny guys cute, but didn’t do it to be nice. She sees you as another person who she can wrap around her finger and get to do what she wants.

Rebecca Lewis- Your high school bully, and first year associate at M.A.R. She is 23 years old, and was in the year above you in school, but you haven’t seen her since she graduated.
She towers above you at 6’1”, with long, curly brown hair and green eyes. Her imposing figure is enhanced by her mammoth curves, which have been sculpted by years of playing volleyball, both in high school and during her time at law school. She has tanned skin from constantly practicing volleyball outside in her free time.
She spent years in high school tormenting you, from simply making you feel small by a constant barrage of insults, to throwing you onto a teacher’s chair before they sat down or her shoe before a volleyball match. Her daily torments at school caused you to develop minor anxiety issues that you had only recently began to recover from.
You haven’t actually had your reunion with her yet, but you did see her at a distance and all the terrible emotions she elicited in you came flooding back. She may have changed, after all it has been years since you’ve seen her, but you doubt it. You fear that she will use you and her working in the same place to relive some of her high school memories, and the embarrassment that will cause you may hurt your image in the eyes of the partners.

Isabella Martin- Another intern, she interviewed at the same time as you and you had a brief conversation with her while you were both waiting for your turns.
She is tall and curvy, standing at 5’10”, with short cut black hair and dark tanned skin, and is 22 years old. Her eyes are a vibrant green colour and she beaming face radiates a friendly warmth. She carries a considerable amount of weight, and sees herself as fat, but many people would describe her as “thicc”.
She is kind and considerate, and during your first meeting with her, she stopped someone from accidentally sitting on you, showing that she is observant and would look out for you. What you don’t know is that awareness disappears when she sits down to do legal work. She isn’t as smart as most of the people who work at M.A.R., and being a lawyer doesn’t come naturally to her, but she makes up for that with perseverance and had work. However, her focus on her work leads to her being incredibly forgetful and unobservant when she is working.


Family
Your family is local to the area round Owentown, and your childhood home is just 25 minutes drive outside of the city. You are the youngest child in your family, and don’t know your father, since he left when you were very young without warning.

Deborah Little- Your mother, she is 45 years old and 5’11” tall. You inherited her black hair and blue eyes, but that is where the resemblance ends. Where you are of average attractiveness, Deborah is on a whole other level of attractiveness. Her long black hair and gorgeous face turn many heads, but not as much as the rest of her does. She has tremendously wide hips and a shirt-straining chest, your friends in high school regularly called her a milf, bringing you no end of embarrassment. For her part, Deborah seems unaware of her own sex appeal, and chalks up most of the attention she receives to people just being friendly.
Deborah is kind and caring towards you, but she was also one of the more dangerous people for you to be around. She happens to be one of the ditziest and clumsiest people you know. You spent many days in your childhood stuck under her feet or ass, and she never really seemed to realise how bad it was for you whenever it happened, never altering her routines to avoid squashing you. On the contrary, she often found the sight of you reduced to a tan smear underneath her funny, her airheadedness made her just assume that you found the situations you got into funny as well. She also would simply continue what she was doing after discovering you, saying that she would free you when she was finished, but she would often forget you again before she finished. This was a common occurrence and you were often left squashed until she either remembered you again, or someone else spotted you.
You often felt that she favoured your sisters over you, but you feel like that was never intentional, it’s just that due to you being squashed a lot that she spent way more time with your sisters than you.
She works as a salesperson in a luxury car dealership, and makes enough money that she can afford to pay for your apartment while you take on your internship.

Sarah Little- Your oldest sister, she is 27 years old. She is blessed by your mother’s genetics, inheriting her good looks and curves, but has long blonde hair instead of black. She stands at 5’9” She has brown eyes and a warm smile on her face almost always.
Sarah is one of the kindest, most considerate people you know and is basically your best friend. While your mother was inattentive due to her airheadedness, Sarah was always there for you. She was most often the person who saved you from Deborah’s accidental crushing, and you two have an incredibly strong bond.
She works in a local hospital as a nurse, so you don’t see her as often as you would like, but she does live in the same apartment building as you. She lives on the third floor of Greentower Apartments, and it was actually her who told you about the vacancy.

Katherine Little- Your older sister, she is 25 years old. She has a much slimmer build than your mother and oldest sister, but is still blessed with some impressive curves. Her long blonde hair constantly has a streak of green dyed in it, to match her eyes. Facially she is probably the most beautiful of your three family members.
Almost completely contrasting from Sarah, Katherine is selfish and self absorbed. She is also incredibly inconsiderate, owed to your mom spoiling her for years. She find it hilarious to squash you or watch others squash you without realising it, and has set up various social media accounts dedicated to these “pranks” which all have huge followings. She makes her money as an Instagram influencer and also streams games on twitch. She lives at home with your mom and shows almost no desire to ever leave, since your mom is there to cater to her every need, a fact that keeps Katherine happy and gives Deborah joy to have one of her children home.

(More characters to be added in the future)

Rules
All entries are to be written in the second person (you, your, etc.), but feel free to switch to their person if you want to briefly describe what one of the giantesses is experiencing in a scenario, for example “As you compressed under her weight with a barely audible squishing sound, Chloe heard nothing. She was too focused on her game to notice the slight difference in the cushioning of her gaming chair.”

Try to ensure that your entries are not too short, at least a few paragraphs, around 600-1000 characters at least ideally, and try to ensure that it adds something to the story. A bridge chapter here and there is fine but no endless chains of them.
Also try to ensure that you spell check and use good grammar. I’d prefer to have a shorter, higher quality interactive than one with a lot of poorly written chapters.

Anthony cannot die, he is able to be stretched, squashed, flattened and anything else you can think of, but he won’t die. He reforms after a certain period of time, lengthened depending on how long he was out of his normal shape for.

Most stuff usually associated with giantess content is fine, although try not to go too heavy handed on really heavy sexual/ insertion content, I probably won’t delete chapters featuring it if they are well written but as a rule of thumb just don’t do it too often.
No content involving giant guys, other guys can feature as long as they are also tiny, but Anthony must remain the main character.

Feel free to add, and I hope people enjoy!
